chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 73 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.6696/2023 3. For hearing of main case 04.12.2023 Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel does not press this application for the time being with permission to file a fresh one after evidence of the witnesses, if so advised. Accordingly, the transfer application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
